name: Cinnamon Applesauce Oatmeal Fatfree Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix applesauce and sugars in a large bowl.
2. Add egg whites, vanilla, baking soda, and cinnamon to the mixture.
3. Gradually add flour, stirring until combined.
4. Stir in oatmeal and raisins until evenly distributed.
5. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
6. Drop spoonfuls of the batter onto a greased baking sheet.
7. Bake for 100 minutes or until golden brown and firm to the touch.
